title: Horror + Server
description:
Server version of Horror +
Do not run as the client, it will not work. 
This modpack is made to download the mods required to run Horror + as a server
body:
### Take the horror to the next level… now in multiplayer.

**Horror+ Server** is the official **server-side** version of the Horror+ Fabric modpack.  
It is built specifically for hosting a Minecraft server and is **not intended to be used as a client modpack**, even though it may technically launch.

This server modpack lets you run a Horror+ multiplayer server with **the exact same atmosphere and gameplay balance** as the client version, without unnecessary client-only mods.

It features the full Horror+ experience:

- **Enhanced terrain generation**
- **New biomes**
- **New hostile mobs**
- **New structures**
- **Corrupted entities**

Your objective remains unchanged: **survive for as long as possible**.  
Days may feel calm, but nights are never safe.


---

### Installation options

You have **3 official ways** to set up a Horror+ server:

**1. Pre-configured server (recommended)**  
Download the [fully pre-configured Horror+ server](https://rdr.one/dwrXuLl
) and follow the tutorial provided in the Google Drive.    
This is the fastest option if you want a **free** ready-to-run server.  

**2. Server modpack**  
Download the Horror+ Server modpack, extract it, and copy the `mods` folder into your Fabric server directory.  

**3. Mods folder only**  
Download the mods folder [here](https://rdr.one/3GC30fN).  
  
Then place the `mods` folder directly into your Fabric server directory.  

---

### Hosting options

You can host the Horror+ server **yourself for free**, directly on your own hardware.  
Performance will depend on your setup.  
⚠ Less than **16 GB RAM**, a **weak CPU**, or a **poor internet connection** may cause lag or crashes.

You can use a **paid hosting provider**, which is generally simpler and avoids network configuration:

- **[BisectHosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/clients/aff.php?aff=6703)** :  
  Starting at ~$16, recommended at least **6 GB RAM**  

- **[Modrinth Hosting](https://modrinth.com/hosting#plan)**:
  Recommended at least **6 GB RAM**  

⚠ **Important for Modrinth Hosting**:  
If you use Modrinth as your host, you **must use the Horror+ Server modpack (this one)**, not the client modpack.  
Using the client version on a server host will not work correctly.

Paid hosting keeps your server online 24/7 and is easier to manage, but it is **more limited than self-hosting**, depending on the plan and hardware.


---

### Support

If you encounter a bug or issue, join the Discord server, accept the rules, go to **Help**, and send a message describing the problem and ping **@amilex**.
